calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

James J. O'Donnell, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Eugene White, who was placed under oath and examined.
Thomas C. Crosby, Esq. appeared for defendant Costco Wholesale Corporation.
Order continuing Trial to May 4, 2009 was filed on January 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, May 4, 2009.

Settlement agreement of the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Crosby. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, defendant Costco Wholesale Corporation shall pay plaintiff Eugene White the sum of $2,500.00. In return, plaintiff Eugen White shall execute a full release of all claims, and dismiss the complaint in this matter with prejudice. Mr. Crosby shall prepare a release for plaintiff's signature, where terms of this agreement shall be reduced to writing.

Plaintiff was voired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the settlement agreement.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-16-2009 Continued To May-04-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN ADEQUATE GOOD CAUSE FOR BRINGING THIS MOTION LESS THAN A WEEK BEFORE TRIAL. RESPONDING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/ER

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
MARISA R. CHAVES, ESQ.(CROSBY & ROWELL LLP), (510)267-0300, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION ("COSTCO")
JAMES J. O'DONNELL, ESQ.(O'DONNELL & SMITH), (415)984-0161, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, EUGENE WHITE

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S("COSTCO") MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE COURT SUSTAINED THE OBJECTION TO MR. KWONG'S TESTIMONY TO THE EXTENT THAT HE TESTIFIES THAT THE HOT DOG CAUSED THE FALL. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE PROVISION OF CCP SECTION 437c(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joseph Vickstein CSR# 4780 (301/PJB/BD)
